CONTENT.Career: He made his Serie C debut for Benevento on 23 October 2011 in a game against Pisa.On 30 July 2015, he was loaned to Lega Pro club Ischia along with Antonio Porcino.In the summer of 2023, Kanouté is made official as Serie C Group C club Taranto's new player. In Taranto he lived one of his best seasons as a footballer, becoming the team's top scorer in that season under head coach Ezio Capuano.Following his impressive season at Taranto, in July 2024, ambitious Serie C club Trapani signed Kanouté by activating a buyout clause on his contract with the Apulians.

SUMMARY: Mamadou Yaye Kanouté (born 7 October 1993) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays for Italian Serie C Group C club Trapani.
